completed_tasks.name: Verify implementation against docs/knowledgebase
completed_tasks.summary: Verified APK builds, all 4 routes wired, permissions in manifest, shell/app boundary respected

decisions.decision: /notify uses NotificationManager for post/cancel, NOT NotificationListenerService interception
decisions.rationale: NotificationManager works without user enabling notification access; GhostNotificationService is a stub for future interception.

decisions.decision: MediaProjection lifecycle: Activity consent → GhosthandServiceRegistry → LocalApiServer → StateCoordinator → MediaProjectionProvider
decisions.rationale: Avoids private companion visibility issues when accessed from MainActivity.
Display.densityDpi not accessible on all API levels.
